skills.name: search-recipes
skills.description: Full-text and faceted search over the SAVOR bilingual recipe corpus (Romanian/Italian, c. 1860–1980). Combine free-text query with optional region/period/course/diet/festive filters.

skills.name: get-recipe
skills.description: Fetch a full SAVOR recipe record by persistent id or slug — multilingual titles, summaries, ingredients, region, period, course, diet, festive occasions, source archive, license and PID.

skills.name: dataset-schema
skills.description: Return the SAVOR-JSON field reference — fields, types, required/optional, and descriptions. Programmatic mirror of /05-dataset.html#fields.
